title: Mansar-Surinsar Wildlife sanctuary
tagline: Mansar-Surinsar Wildlife sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Jammu & Kashmir

overview.short: Mansar-Surinsar Lakes Wildlife sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary is situated in Mansar in Samba district in Indian union territory of Jammu and Kashmir.
overview.description: Mansar-Surinsar Lakes Wildlife sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary is situated in Mansar in Samba district in Indian union territory of Jammu and Kashmir. It is located 19 km from Samba town & 85 km from city of Jammu. It covers 3.5 square kilometers. It was established in 2005, under the Wildlife Protection Act of 1972.

topPlaces.name: Majalta
topPlaces.description: Majalta is a Town and Tehsil which comes under Udhampur East Assembly constituency of Udhampur district, Jammu and Kashmir, India.

topPlaces.name: Manwal
topPlaces.description: Manwal is a town in Udhampur district of the Jammu division of Jammu and Kashmir, India. It lies 28 km (17 mi) away from the district headquarters of Udhampur.

topPlaces.name: Mansar Lake
topPlaces.description: Mansar Lake is a lake located in Mansar in the Samba district in the Indian union territory of Jammu and Kashmir. It is located 19 km from Samba town & 62 km (39 mi) from the city of Jammu.

topPlaces.name: Surinsar Lake
topPlaces.description: Surinsar Lake is a lake which is situated in Surinsar in Samba district in Indian union territory of Jammu and Kashmir. It is located 19 km from Samba town & 42 km (26 mi) from Jammu city by road, surrounded by hills and dense forests, and has some mythological importance.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mansar-Surinsar Wildlife sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mansar-Surinsar Wildlife sanctuary is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mansar-Surinsar Wildlife sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jammu Airport (35 km) and the nearest railway station is Jammu Tawi (33 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mansar-Surinsar Wildlife sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mansar-Surinsar Wildlife sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mansar-Surinsar Wildlife sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Mansar-Surinsar Wildlife sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mansar-Surinsar Wildlife sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Majalta, Manwal, Mansar Lake, Surinsar Lake.
